## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss process enhancements for content creation, particularly for exec and Smith.ai accounts](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Usman to roll back to previous artifact version for exec due to issues with new agentic pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3923.0)
  - [Jo to review NetNew articles for exec; refreshes still in progress](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4068.0)
  - [Smith.ai account lacks clear documentation/processes; Jo to follow up with Megan](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4376.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving outline creation to reduce later editing time](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3622.0)

## Topics

### exec Content Creation Process

  - [Current issue: New agentic pipeline not applying writing guideline "rules"](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3714.0)
  - [Solution: Roll back to previous artifact version temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3923.0)
  - [Jo to prioritize review of pipeline documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3923.0)
  - [Usman to send NetNew articles for review today](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4068.0)
  - [Focus on creating detailed outlines to minimize later edits](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=3622.0)
  - [Maintain consistent brand messaging across different topics](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Smith.ai Account Management

  - [Lack of clear documentation and processes](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4376.0)
  - [Usman mainly worked on refreshes, limited experience with new content](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4434.0)
  - [Historical context missing due to personnel changes](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4491.0)
  - [Jo to discuss with Megan (account director) for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4376.0)

### Content Quality and Feedback

  - [exec feedback: Content quality has improved overall](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4322.0)
  - [Minor issues with occasional "clunky" sentences or examples](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4187.0)
  - [Usman should flag uncertain sections for Jo's review](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4211.0)
  - [Highlight new/updated sections in green for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4256.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Update ticket statuses and Content OS regularly](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4134.0)
  - [Overcommunicate on changes and uncertainties](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4187.0)
  - [Aim to reduce Friday workload by improving efficiency throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/zqZMsASpErysr7dyRRHS7txKQUTmpT44?tab=summary&timestamp=4298.0)
